page_content:
# Dr Horn
had him for biochemistry 1.
At the time I had already taken principles of biochemistry before coming into his class and the MCAT so I felt like I already knew what was going on.
He had a lot of research based mini projects for recitation where he would have us use tools that he felt were important to the field of biochemsitry
BLAST, research ALPHA fold, and he would have us work independently or with teams.
He exposed me to alpha fold which got me interested in ai as a junior in college.
I would ask a lot of questions and be very interactive in class ( maybe even to the oint of annoyance) the main reason was to ensure that I stayed engaged as I did not need to take biochemistry in undergrade ( it was an elective) but I thought it would look good on my medical school application and so to remain engaged enough in the course so that I could actually be productive in the class and get a good grade i interacted a lot.
Dr horn really likes dr pepper
his research is over plant derived fatty acids
I never went to office hours
